nodes.description: Students develop understanding of triangle properties, congruence, and reasoning through proof and construction.

nodes.title: Exponents and Roots
nodes.description: Students extend their understanding of exponents to include negative and rational exponents, apply laws of exponents, work with scientific notation, simplify radical expressions, and solve radical equations.

nodes.title: Polynomials
nodes.description: Students work with polynomial expressions — classifying, adding, subtracting, multiplying, and factoring them. They learn special product patterns, develop fluency with factoring techniques, and solve polynomial equations using the zero product property.

nodes.title: Quadratic Functions
nodes.description: Students explore quadratic functions in depth — graphing in vertex form, factoring and solving quadratic equations, completing the square, using the quadratic formula, and applying quadratic models to real-world problems involving projectile motion, optimization, and area.

nodes.title: Trigonometric Identities & Equations
nodes.description: Students develop fluency with trigonometric identities — fundamental, Pythagorean, sum/difference, and double/half-angle — and use them to simplify expressions, verify identities, and solve trigonometric equations algebraically and graphically.

nodes.title: Quadrilaterals
nodes.description: Students develop understanding of quadrilateral properties, classifications, and coordinate geometry proofs involving parallelograms, trapezoids, and special quadrilaterals.

nodes.title: Similarity
nodes.description: Students develop understanding of similar figures, triangle similarity criteria, and proportional reasoning used in indirect measurement and real-world applications.

nodes.title: Right Triangles & Trigonometry
nodes.description: Students develop understanding of right triangle relationships, the Pythagorean theorem, special right triangles, trigonometric ratios, and the Law of Sines and Cosines for solving any triangle.

nodes.title: Circles
nodes.description: Students develop understanding of circle vocabulary, angle and arc relationships, chord properties, tangent and secant lines, and the equation of a circle in the coordinate plane.

nodes.title: Measurement
nodes.description: Students extend their understanding of area, surface area, and volume to two-dimensional polygons and three-dimensional solids including prisms, pyramids, cylinders, cones, and spheres.

nodes.title: Probability
